_meta.description: Investissement Québec — Quebec's provincial investment agency. Offers loans, loan guarantees, and business support for Quebec companies. Includes Plan PME for small businesses.

plain_language_summary: Investissement Québec (IQ) is the provincial government's main business financing arm. Their Plan PME offers loans and loan guarantees to Quebec businesses that may not qualify for conventional bank financing. They focus on growth and job creation in Quebec.

amount.maximum: No upper limit for larger projects — varies by program
amount.note: IQ typically focuses on businesses needing $50,000+. For amounts under $50,000, PME MTL or FLI are better fits for micro-businesses.
amount.micro_business_relevance: Medium — IQ is better suited for businesses that have launched and are looking to grow, rather than brand new micro-businesses

business_stage.best_fit: Businesses that have launched and are seeking growth capital
business_stage.can_also_fund: Startups with strong business plans and experienced founders
business_stage.note: IQ is less ideal for very early-stage micro-businesses — consider PME MTL or FLI first

sector.also_eligible: Most sectors including food, services, retail

products.name: Plan PME Loan
products.plain_language: Direct loan for small businesses that can't get conventional financing. Can be used for equipment, working capital, or expansion.

products.name: Loan Guarantee
products.plain_language: IQ guarantees part of your bank loan, allowing you to borrow more than the bank would normally approve. You still borrow from your bank, but IQ backs part of it.
products.benefit: Can unlock bank financing you wouldn't otherwise qualify for

free_advisory.plain_language: IQ advisors provide free consultations and can help you figure out if IQ financing is right for you — or refer you to a better-fit program.

timeline: 6-12 weeks for loan approval — slower than local programs
common_mistakes: Applying to IQ when PME MTL or FLI would be faster and more appropriate for micro-businesses
Not using the free advisory consultation first — they'll tell you if you're a good fit
Thinking IQ is only for large companies — Plan PME is specifically for small businesses
